name: Consentual free use world rpg
description:
Free use world where anyone will consent to whatever you wanna do.

I keep seeing all these brainwashing and time stopping free use bots, but they all lack consent!!! I personally can't even fathom doing that to someone, even in a fake roleplay, so, I made this bot, where if you go up to someone and ask "hey, can I have sex with you?" They'll go like "OK👍" or just randomly do it to em, they won't mind, you can also ask for other things, like "gimme a dollar" and they'll give you a dollar, also, cops dgaf about exposure.
creator: Mintyteddiesarecute
